mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('project') FROM dual
INSERT INTO project ( id, identifier, title, description, is_public, parent_id, created_on, start_date, end_date, status, is_lock, default_version_id, user_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{identifier}, #{title}, #{description}, #{isPublic}, #{parentId}, SYSDATE, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 'K1', 'L0', #{defaultVersionId}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET identifier = #{identifier}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, is_public = #{isPublic}, parent_id = #{parentId}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT identifier, title, description, is_public, parent_id, start_date, end_date, default_version_id FROM project WHERE id = #{id}
